benefits.title: Authentic Quality
benefits.description: Every jersey is checked for quality before dispatch. Fan edition jerseys built for everyday comfort.

benefits.title: Fast Nationwide Delivery
benefits.description: We deliver to all 64 districts in Bangladesh. Most orders shipped within 1–2 business days.

benefits.title: WhatsApp Support
benefits.description: Order or enquire via WhatsApp. Our team responds quickly and helps you find the right jersey.

benefits.title: Easy Exchange
benefits.description: Wrong size? We offer hassle-free size exchanges within 7 days of delivery. Your satisfaction matters.

benefits.title: Best Prices
benefits.description: Competitive pricing on all jerseys. Premium fan edition quality at prices that won't break the bank.

benefits.title: Secure Packaging
benefits.description: Jerseys are carefully packed to avoid damage during transit. Delivered in pristine condition every time.

seo.defaultTitle: The Outfit Spot — Wear Your Passion
seo.defaultDescription: Shop authentic club jerseys, fan edition jerseys, and sports trousers in Bangladesh. Fast delivery nationwide.

delivery.chargeNote: Delivery charge: ৳60 inside Dhaka, ৳120 outside Dhaka. Free delivery on orders above ৳2,000.
delivery.returnPolicy: Size exchange accepted within 7 days of delivery. Item must be unused, unwashed, and in original condition. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange exchange.

about.title: About The Outfit Spot
about.description: The Outfit Spot is Bangladesh's trusted online jersey store. We specialize in fan edition club jerseys, national team jerseys, and sports trousers — all available at competitive prices with nationwide delivery.
about.mission: Our mission is to make it easy for football fans across Bangladesh to wear their passion. Whether you support Manchester United, Argentina, or any team in between — we have the jersey for you.
